steps.title: Notice proposed versus current
steps.content: The first sentence describes proposed wind farms and uses "would generate" for future capacity. The second sentence gives the current record for a single offshore wind farm.

steps.title: Reject imprecise links
steps.content: A suggests the current record is predictable, which the passage does not show. C marks a general contrast but misses the time shift. D signals similarity, though the proposed values are much larger than the current record.

steps.title: Mark the present record
steps.content: Presently signals the move from proposed future capacities to what is currently true. The answer is B.
